method: Wave 0 matte pipeline, per-asset complement-fringe repaint/alpha contraction, four-background visual review
timing_basis: active operator minutes measured during the 07:39:58–07:56:32 +08:00 retouch/review window; shared tool execution time excluded and shared tuning time allocated to the affected asset
budget_note: The Wave 0 hard-VFX allowance was 10–25 minutes per image. Actual time was lower because this batch used hard-core/no-fog prompts and the calibrated repeatable edge-repair pass; the observed time is reported without padding.
